lines.hearsay: The cellar at {place} stood open a good while.
lines.gossip: {A} went through the whole cellar at {place} before the first customer and came up pleased — {A} will not say so, but {place} has not been this well found since the year the road was good.
lines.report: {A} took stock at {place} and found the cellar in hand (trade {A.trade}), slot {slot}.
